recalled_cases.pattern: USB 3.0 bus reset during high-bandwidth sensor operation
recalled_cases.resolution_summary: Identified USB cable EMI sensitivity. Replaced with shielded cable, added ferrite core.
recalled_cases.why_retrieved: Pattern match: USB bus reset + LiDAR data interruption + navigation degradation
recalled_cases.environment_difference: Different robot, same sensor model, different deployment site

recalled_cases.pattern: 12V rail fluctuation correlated with USB device reset
recalled_cases.resolution_summary: Power supply capacitor aging. Replaced PSU under preventive maintenance.
recalled_cases.why_retrieved: Temporal correlation between power fluctuation and USB reset

recalled_cases.pattern: Localization topic rate drop without sensor hardware fault
recalled_cases.resolution_summary: CPU thermal throttling during peak load. Improved cooling, adjusted task priority.
recalled_cases.why_retrieved: Similar symptom (topic rate drop) but different robot model
recalled_cases.environment_difference: Different model (T200 vs T300), different compute platform
